contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact us in the way that's most convenient for you or book an appointment online

emergency.title: 🚨 Emergency Care
emergency.description: In case of acute pain or injury, contact us immediately:

appointment.q: Do I need to book in advance?
appointment.a: Yes, we work by appointment. This allows us to dedicate enough time and attention to each patient.

reschedule.a: Yes, you can reschedule by notifying us 24 hours before your scheduled visit.

documents.a: Bring your passport or ID. If you have a medical card, please bring it too.

warranty.a: Yes, we provide warranty on all services according to medical standards and requirements.

hero.title: Your Smile - Our Mission

features.subtitle: We combine professionalism, modern technologies and an individual approach to achieve the best treatment results

cookieConsent.description: We use cookies for analytics and to improve the quality of our services. You can choose which categories of cookies to allow.

errorTracking.description: Help us detect and fix technical issues (Sentry).

meta.title: Dental Story - Modern Dental Clinic in Lviv | Sumska St., 10
meta.description: Professional dental clinic at Sumska St., 10. Full range of services: treatment, implants, orthodontics. Painless treatment, modern equipment. Booking: 068 232 38 38
